response.justification: Strong fullstack profile with 15+ years of experience spanning Node.js, TypeScript, React, and cross-stack work. Current role at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent requirement. Solid testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops) aligns with the team's quality bar. Some gaps: no explicit Nest.js experience, Kotlin/Java exposure is dated, and cloud/Kubernetes mentions are limited.
strengths: Deep fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB across multiple senior roles
Active AI-agent and MCP tooling work at current role matches a key requirement
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, Vitest-adjacent ecosystem, public workshops)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
Kotlin/Java exposure is limited and not recent (mostly pre-2018 robotics work)
Cloud/Kubernetes experience mentioned only briefly; depth on AWS/GCP/Azure unclear
